```{python}

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pygwalker as pyg
import seaborn as sns

df = pd.read_csv(r'C:\Users\ATL8CA\Desktop\Datasets\parkinson\parkinsons_updrs.data')
df

df['sex'] = df['sex'].replace({0: 'Male', 1: 'Female'})

plt.title('Distribuition of Parkinson')
sns.barplot(data=df, 
            hue='sex', 
            x='total_UPDRS', 
            y='sex', 
            col=['b', 'g']
            )

plt.xlabel('')
plt.ylabel('')

```
